return(function(L,Q,o,k,N,V,q,f,A,m,W,H,b,T,s,v,d,D,R,r,C,x,B,h)H,B,m,h,A,T,D,v,R,f,b,s,r,x,C,W,d=function(L,E)local Q=s(E)local o=function(o,k,N,V)return D(L,{o,k;N,V},E,Q)end return o end,{},function(L,E)local Q=s(E)local o=function(...)return D(L,{...},E,Q)end return o end,function(L,E)local Q=s(E)local o=function()return D(L,{},E,Q)end return o
